title: Hiring Store Manager at Taj Hotels Retail

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Taj Hotels Retail
jsonLd.description:
Taj Hotels Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj Hotels Retail:
Taj Hotels Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail!
